title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
